commands.review_summary:
The PR updates plugin test expectations for Discord model-picker pagination, Google Meet realtime session mocks, Gemini web-search freshness timer isolation, and QA runtime parity scenario membership.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-maintenance PR rather than a user-visible bug report. The changed expectations are source-checkable against current test and runtime contracts.
commands.review_followup: The remaining action is maintainer review and merge handling for a protected draft test-only PR, not an autonomous repair task.

target.title: test(plugins): align prerelease shard expectations
target.body:
## Summary

- align Discord model picker tests with provider pagination nav buttons
- give Google Meet realtime consult tests a session mock that matches the runtime API
- refresh QA runtime parity tier expectations for standard Codex lifecycle scenarios
- avoid Gemini web-search cache/timer interference in adjacent freshness tests

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/allowed-updates.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot.create-telegram-bot.channel-post-media.test.ts extensions/google-meet/index.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/google/web-search-provider.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker.test.ts`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker.test.ts extensions/google/web-search-provider.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/google-meet/index.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: plugin prerelease extension shard test drift for Discord provider pagination, Google Meet realtime consult mocks, Gemini freshness tests, and QA runtime parity tier expectations.
Real environment tested: local Codex worktree on macOS with repo-linked dependencies; broad remote changed gate attempted via Blacksmith Testbox and Crabbox AWS.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/telegram/src/allowed-updates.test.ts extensions/telegram/src/bot.create-telegram-bot.channel-post-media.test.ts extensions/google-meet/index.test.ts extensions/voice-call/src/runtime.test.ts extensions/qa-lab/src/cli.runtime.test.ts extensions/google/web-search-provider.test.ts extensions/discord/src/monitor/model-picker.test.ts`.
Evidence after fix: 7 test files passed; 232 tests passed after rebasing on latest `origin/main`.
Observed result after fix: the focused failures from Plugin Prerelease run 26289777600 are green in the rebased checkout.
What was not tested: `pnpm check:changed` did not run because Blacksmith Testbox was not authenticated and Crabbox AWS lacked usable credentials in this environment.
target.author: vincentkoc
